content.en:
"Miyang Daozu, I didn't expect you to be forcibly born!"

Zixu Sword Ancestor appeared, dressed in battle armor and holding a long sword, even if he was bound by layers of regular knives and regular chains, he still showed the domineering and strong of the Sword Ancestor.

Miyang Dao Ancestor also walked out of the void, and he was also bound by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, but compared to the Zixu Sword Ancestor, he seemed more indifferent.

Zixu Sword Ancestor is a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and Miyang Dao Ancestor's strength is even stronger, it is the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and there is only one step left from the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Moreover, the Miyang Dao Ancestor has already mastered the Supreme Yang Dao, but even if he has mastered the Supreme Dao, he only has the opportunity to forcibly break through and enter the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

It's a pity that he once failed to break through, so he could only break through to become a supreme Dao Ancestor by mastering the power of the dark taboo.

This time, the Forbidden Treasure was born, which might help him completely grasp the power of the Dark Taboo.

Thus, he was forcibly born.

Bang!!!!

Miyang Dao Ancestor and Zixu Sword Ancestor fought, one side was the Sword Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect, and the other was the Dao Ancestor of the Nine Heavenly Forces Mitian Sect.

The battle between the two sides caused many True Ancestors to retreat one after another, not daring to approach.

At this time, the Golden Light Sword Venerable and the Heaven Slashing Sword Venerable made a move, entering the True Ancestor Battlefield in an attempt to rescue the Changfeng Sword Venerable.

Obviously, they had received orders from the Zixu Sword Ancestor, otherwise it would be impossible to risk their lives to save the Changfeng Sword Venerable.

However, at this moment, another Dao Ancestor appeared.

This is a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, his strength is not very strong, but he is proficient in the art of assassination, and in an instant, a terrifying battle power erupted, and a sword pierced through the body of Changfeng Sword Venerable.

At this moment, the Changfeng Sword was dying of his wounds, and he had no strength to fight again.

"Yinsha Daozu, you dare!"

Zixu Sword Ancestor was furious.

Yinsha Dao Ancestor was a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Zixia Sect, but he didn't expect to be so bold that he dared to be forcibly born with the strength of a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was born, and his strength could only exert the strength of the ordinary Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, although it was stronger than the Changfeng Sword Venerable, it could not face the siege of many invincible True Ancestors!

"Zixu Sword Ancestor, I'm sorry, my path has reached the extreme, the Forbidden Treasure is my hope, and I will do whatever it takes to do so!"

As he spoke, Yinsha Daozu grabbed the Changfeng Sword Venerable, preparing to leave directly with the dying Changfeng Sword Venerable.

It's a pity that he still underestimated the sensationality of the Forbidden Treasure this time, and the Dao Ancestors who are eyeing the Forbidden Treasure are far more than the three of them.

Suddenly.

As if something terrible had come, Yinsha Dao Ancestor's body suddenly cracked.

"Causal Dao Technique-Causal Collapse Technique, it's you, Qingyuan Dao Ancestor!"

Yinsha Daozu roared.

The Causal Collapse Technique is one of the Great Thousand Dao Techniques, and it is extremely powerful, capable of silently killing enemies through cause and effect.

It can be said that as long as the two sides produce a little cause and effect, Qingyuan Dao Ancestor can attack the other party through the cause and effect collapse technique.

The causal collapse technique is a great thousand dao technique created by Qingyuan Dao Ancestor, and only he can do it, so the person who makes the move must be Qingyuan Dao Ancestor.

Qingyuan Dao Ancestor is a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and his frontal attack and killing ability is not very strong, but his sneak attack and auxiliary abilities are very terrifying.

If one Dao Ancestor is fighting with another Dao Ancestor, and being attacked by Qingyuan Dao Ancestor like this, it will definitely be over.

Originally, Yinsha Dao Ancestor would not have been severely injured by Qingyuan Dao Ancestor's causal collapse technique, but the key was that now that he was suppressed by the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, he was hit so hard that it was difficult to resist the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm all of a sudden.

As a result, the aura of the Silver Sand Dao Ancestor continued to decline.

But even so, he gritted his teeth and did not run away, but put away the Changfeng Sword Venerable, and then fled as fast as he could.

It's a pity that after his strength declined, he was stopped by the invincible true ancestors around him.

Ahem!ahem!ahem!

Yinsha Daozu kept coughing up blood in the void, his body kept cracking and healing, and his injuries became more and more serious.

Abrupt.

A spear pierced his body, pinning him directly into the void.

At the same time, the power contained in this spear completely cut off the last vitality of the Silver Sand Dao Ancestor.

A Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor has fallen!

At the place where the Silver Sand Dao Ancestor fell, a Dao Ancestor appeared with a spear in his hand.

Many people recognized it, and the person who shot it was the Eightfold Heavenly Force Divine Spear Sect's Overlord Dao Ancestor, and he was also a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The domineering Dao Ancestor directly took away the body of the Silver Sand Dao Ancestor, but was soon stopped by the three Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

-----------------

"It's messed up, it's all messed up!"

Ye Tian muttered inwardly.

Dao Ancestors appeared one by one, and they all forcibly stared at the rules to suppress the birth, and paid a great price, just for the slightest chance of breakthrough in the dark.

Of course, those Dao Ancestors with great potential were not born because they were not worth it.

After all, they may not be able to grab the forbidden treasure, forcibly born and damage the foundation, maybe they will fall!

The Dao Ancestors who appeared this time were all Dao Ancestors who had no hope of progress and only wanted to break through with the help of the Forbidden Arcana.

"I wonder if there will be an Eightfold Heaven Supreme Dao Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

He didn't stay here any longer, but returned to the Forbidden Ancient Well.

Now, the Dao Ancestors have appeared one by one, and there is no chance for him at all.

Unless he can step into the combat power of the Supreme True Ancestor and cultivate for millions of years, he will be able to compete with those Dao Ancestors.

Now, if he intervenes and is targeted by multiple Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, it is estimated that he will be in complete trouble, and if he is lucky, he can escape, and if he is unlucky, he will fall directly.

There are many true ancestors who have the same idea as Ye Tian, such as the Blood Demon General, the Ferris General, and the Wind Star General of Black Wind Mountain are very knowledgeable, so they didn't participate, and they also returned to the Forbidden Ancient Well to strive for more forbidden treasures.

What if you're lucky enough to find another forbidden treasure and no one finds it?

The depths of the Endless Void.

There are two consciousnesses communicating, one is the Wind King of Black Wind Mountain, and the other is the Fire King of Black Wind Mountain.

"Wind King, aren't you going to make a move, you're a top-notch Supreme Dao Ancestor, and your injuries have healed. If you make a move, it will be enough to exert the strength of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and you can snatch that forbidden treasure in an instant!"

"Fire King, why don't you make a move? You are sure to snatch the forbidden treasure!"

The Wind King sneered.

"Hahaha, I won't rob it, I haven't been long after I stepped into the ranks of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and I don't know how many long years it will take to hit the ranks of the top Supreme Dao Ancestors!

"Hmph, even if I don't use the Forbidden Treasure Treasure, I am sure that I will be promoted to the Invincible True Ancestor! Besides, do you think that I am the only one who is staring at the Forbidden Treasure now? What if there are other Powerful Dao Ancestors who also make a move? In that case, I will not be able to snatch it! Besides, how dare you guarantee that this is not a game? a bureau that weakens the forces of all our parties and causes conflicts between the major forces?"

"You mean the Heavenly Emperor Palace?" the Fire King frowned, "The power of the Heavenly Emperor Palace far surpasses ours, there is no need to lay it out, right? Besides, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will not ignore the forbidden treasures!"

"That's not for sure, anyway, I think the Heavenly Emperor Palace has a big plan, and they are afraid that the major forces will unite against them, maybe the plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace will cause all the forces to be enemies with them, so it is normal for us to fight each other! Besides, the Forbidden Treasure is also divided into many kinds, who knows what the Forbidden Treasure is for? What if it compares to the chicken?"

The Fire King was silent and did not continue.

In the end, they didn't shoot either.

Not only did they not make a move, but none of the Supreme Dao Ancestors made a move, but a group of Dao Ancestors who were at the extreme of the Seven Heavens fought and killed.

In just a few moments, they completely smashed this piece of void, and countless powerful rule powers raged, turning this area into a forbidden land, and I am afraid it will take a long time to recover under the rules of the Xuan Void Ancient Realm.

In the end, few people know who that forbidden treasure fell into.

But it is rumored that this time more than one Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor has fallen, and the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor has also fallen several, which is even greater than the impact of the destruction of the Heavenly Spirit Sect.

At this time, Ye Tian was still looking for forbidden strange things in the forbidden ancient well.

But at this time, he saw an acquaintance!
